pillars.title: Security
pillars.description: Demo Static Website implements security group rules and access controls. All sensitive configurations are parameterized to enforce organizational standards.

pillars.title: Reliability
pillars.description: Multi-AZ deployment ensures resilience against availability zone failures.

pillars.title: Cost Optimization
pillars.description: Configurable resource sizing allows teams to match capacity to actual workload requirements.

pillars.title: Performance Efficiency
pillars.description: Configurable instance types and resource parameters allow tuning Demo Static Website for specific workload characteristics.

pillars.title: Operational Excellence
pillars.description: Consistent resource tagging supports cost allocation and operational visibility. Pulumi state management tracks all infrastructure changes with full audit trail.
